name: Sweet Potato Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream butter, brown sugar, and honey together in a bowl.
3. Beat in the beaten egg.
4. In a separate bowl, stir together flour, dry milk powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and wheat germ.
5. Add this mixture to the egg mixture and beat well.
6. Stir in shredded sweet potato, grated lemon rind, coconut, rolled oats, and chopped nuts; mix until combined.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a rack.
